PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.env($|\.local|\.production|\.development)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit .env files — contains sensitive API keys. Edit manually.' >&2; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'susan-outputs/'; then echo 'BLOCK: susan-outputs/ is generated by Susan. Use /susan-plan to regenerate.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then cd /Users/mikerodgers/Desktop/alex-recruiting-project/alex-recruiting && npx next lint --file "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" --quiet 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
